Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder

Enclosing interface:
BroadcastsApiAuth
public static interface BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder

    default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder

    default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder

    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder

    default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    infoTimeControlFIDE(Function<FideTC.Provider,FideTC> provider)
     
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    infoTournamentFormat(String format)
     
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    name(String name)
     
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    players(String players)
    Replace player names, ratings and titles.
    When broadcast rounds receive PGN data (pushed or polled), it is possible to apply player information replacement of the tags in the PGN, based on the player name tags.
    The replacements are specified in the broadcast with one line per player.
    It is possible to augment the PGN tags with information from their FIDE profile by matching a player name to a FIDE ID,
    or by manually specifying values of PGN tags.
    FIDE ID format
    <player name> = <FIDE ID>
    <player name> = <FIDE ID> / <title>
    Manual format
    <player name> / <rating> / <title> / <new name>

    The <rating>, <title> and <new name> are optional and can be left blank.
    Player names ignore case and punctuation, and match all possible combinations of 2 words:
    "Jorge Rick Vito" will match "Jorge Rick", "jorge vito", "Rick, Vito", etc.
    Example: 
      var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .description("Broadcast Description")
     .players("""
         Anna = 14111330
         Art = 7818424 / NM
         Some One / 2700 / WGM / Numero Uno
         Someone Else / / / Deuce
         Other Player / 1300 / /
         """));
    default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    showRatingDiffs()
     
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    showRatingDiffs(boolean showRatingDiffs)
    Show player's rating diffs.
    default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    showScores()
     
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    showScores(boolean showScores)
    Show players scores based on game results.
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    teams(String teams)
    Assign players to teams.
    By default the PGN tags WhiteTeam and BlackTeam are used.
    One line per player, formatted as such:
    <Team name>;<FIDE ID or Player name>
      var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .description("Broadcast Description")
     .teamTable()
     .teams("""
         Team Cats;3408230
         Team Dogs;Scooby Doo
         """));
    default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    teamTable()
    Show a team leaderboard.
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    teamTable(boolean teamTable)
    Show a team leaderboard.
    BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    tier(int tier)
    Only for admins.

  • Method Details

    • name

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder name(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - Name of the broadcast tournament.
      Length must be between 3 and 80 characters.
      Example: Sinquefield Cup

    • description

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder description(String description)
      Parameters:
      description - Optional long description of the broadcast. Markdown is supported.
      Length must be less than 20,000 characters.

    • infoTimeControl

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoTimeControl(String timeControl)

    • infoTournamentFormat

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoTournamentFormat(String format)

    • infoFeaturedPlayers

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoFeaturedPlayers(String players)

    • infoFeaturedPlayers

      default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoFeaturedPlayers(String player1, String player2)

    • infoFeaturedPlayers

      default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoFeaturedPlayers(String player1, String player2, String player3)

    • infoFeaturedPlayers

      default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoFeaturedPlayers(String player1, String player2, String player3, String player4)

    • infoTimeControlFIDE

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoTimeControlFIDE(FideTC fideTimeControl)

    • infoTimeControlFIDE

      default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder infoTimeControlFIDE(Function<FideTC.Provider,FideTC> provider)

    • tier

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder tier(int tier)
      Only for admins.
      Parameters:
      tier - Broadcast tier. [3 4 5]. 3 normal, 4 high, 5 best.

    • showRatingDiffs

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder showRatingDiffs(boolean showRatingDiffs)
      Show player's rating diffs. Default: `true`

    • showRatingDiffs

      default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder showRatingDiffs()

    • showScores

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder showScores(boolean showScores)
      Show players scores based on game results. Default: `true`

    • showScores

      default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder showScores()

    • teamTable

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder teamTable(boolean teamTable)
      Show a team leaderboard.

    • teamTable

      default BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder teamTable()
      Show a team leaderboard.

    • players

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder players(String players)
      Replace player names, ratings and titles.
      When broadcast rounds receive PGN data (pushed or polled), it is possible to apply player information replacement of the tags in the PGN, based on the player name tags.
      The replacements are specified in the broadcast with one line per player.
      It is possible to augment the PGN tags with information from their FIDE profile by matching a player name to a FIDE ID,
      or by manually specifying values of PGN tags.
      FIDE ID format
      <player name> = <FIDE ID>
      <player name> = <FIDE ID> / <title>
      Manual format
      <player name> / <rating> / <title> / <new name>

      The <rating>, <title> and <new name> are optional and can be left blank.
      Player names ignore case and punctuation, and match all possible combinations of 2 words:
      "Jorge Rick Vito" will match "Jorge Rick", "jorge vito", "Rick, Vito", etc.
      Example: 
        var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .description("Broadcast Description")
     .players("""
         Anna = 14111330
         Art = 7818424 / NM
         Some One / 2700 / WGM / Numero Uno
         Someone Else / / / Deuce
         Other Player / 1300 / /
         """));

    • teams

      BroadcastsApiAuth.BroadcastBuilder teams(String teams)
      Assign players to teams.
      By default the PGN tags WhiteTeam and BlackTeam are used.
      One line per player, formatted as such:
      <Team name>;<FIDE ID or Player name>
        var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .description("Broadcast Description")
     .teamTable()
     .teams("""
         Team Cats;3408230
         Team Dogs;Scooby Doo
         """));
